previousAuditComparison.description: Comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleObservation: Audit confirmed robust financial controls and compliance across departments.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Maintain current control effectiveness and regularly review process documentation.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleObservation: Identified minor discrepancies in inventory reconciliation procedures last cycle.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleRecommendation: Implement daily inventory checks and provide staff training on new system.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
